title: Evangelion 111 Funimation Pamphlet Question
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 1.11 Funimation Pamphlet Question             Quote Post by LelouchR2 » Sun May 22, 2011 2:27 am Hey guys. I just had a quick question regarding a statement in the Evangelion blu-ray pamphlet. It states in the introduction writing that, "This magnificent new series will be released in four parts (the third and fourth parts being released together), with the other three being 2.0, 3.0 and ???." To be frank, it confuses me. Is this saying that 3.0 and 4.0, being parts three and 4 respectively, going to be released at the same time? Or am I reading this wrong. Thanks

[]: Re: Evangelion 1.11 Funimation Pamphlet Question             Quote Post by svenge » Sun May 22, 2011 3:02 am LelouchR2 wrote: Hey guys. I just had a quick question regarding a statement in the Evangelion blu-ray pamphlet. It states in the introduction writing that, "This magnificent new series will be released in four parts (the third and fourth parts being released together), with the other three being 2.0, 3.0 and ???." To be frank, it confuses me. Is this saying that 3.0 and 4.0, being parts three and 4 respectively, going to be released at the same time? Or am I reading this wrong. Thanks

[]:             Quote Post by LelouchR2 » Sun May 22, 2011 4:41 am Oh I see. I seem to remember that the projects original intention was to remake the original series if that is correct, and in doing so release the last two movies together because they were going with the script of the original series but making the last movie have a completely different ending. Because it would be easier to release the first three movies within a short time frame IF they had gone by the tv series' storyline. Since Anno had decided to completely write 2.0 - 4.0's scripts from scratch, then that probably will mean that they will now be released one by one. I am basing the above speculation off of the Evangelion 2.0 CRC interview posted by 1731298478.

Article: Evangelion 111 Funimation Pamphlet Question
[]: Evangelion 1.11 Funimation Pamphlet Question             Quote Post by LelouchR2 » Sun May 22, 2011 2:27 am Hey guys. I just had a quick question regarding a statement in the Evangelion blu-ray pamphlet. It states in the introduction writing that, "This magnificent new series will be released in four parts (the third and fourth parts being released together), with the other three being 2.0, 3.0 and ???." To be frank, it confuses me. Is this saying that 3.0 and 4.0, being parts three and 4 respectively, going to be released at the same time? Or am I reading this wrong. Thanks

[]: Re: Evangelion 1.11 Funimation Pamphlet Question             Quote Post by svenge » Sun May 22, 2011 3:02 am LelouchR2 wrote: Hey guys. I just had a quick question regarding a statement in the Evangelion blu-ray pamphlet. It states in the introduction writing that, "This magnificent new series will be released in four parts (the third and fourth parts being released together), with the other three being 2.0, 3.0 and ???." To be frank, it confuses me. Is this saying that 3.0 and 4.0, being parts three and 4 respectively, going to be released at the same time? Or am I reading this wrong. Thanks

[]:             Quote Post by LelouchR2 » Sun May 22, 2011 4:41 am Oh I see. I seem to remember that the projects original intention was to remake the original series if that is correct, and in doing so release the last two movies together because they were going with the script of the original series but making the last movie have a completely different ending. Because it would be easier to release the first three movies within a short time frame IF they had gone by the tv series' storyline. Since Anno had decided to completely write 2.0 - 4.0's scripts from scratch, then that probably will mean that they will now be released one by one. I am basing the above speculation off of the Evangelion 2.0 CRC interview posted by 1731298478.
